name: get_weather_map_tile
description: Retrieve weather visualization map tiles that can be overlaid on popular mapping libraries like Mapbox, Google Maps, Leaflet, and OpenLayers. Available layers include precipitation, temperature, wind speed, cloud cover, humidity, and pressure. Tiles follow the standard z/x/y web map tile scheme.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Weather data layer to display: 'precipitationIntensity', 'temperature', 'windSpeed', 'cloudCover', 'humidity', etc.

parameters.name: timestep
parameters.description: Time offset from now for the tile data.

body.note: Returns a PNG image tile (256x256 pixels) suitable for map overlay rendering.
